The crypto keys hadn’t been changed in 19 years. https://thenextweb.com/news/taiwan-high-speed-rail-hacked-student-tetra-sdr Sun, 17 May 2026 09:35:13 +0000 TheNextWeb=53ce308a6cee8de7a92bc3ff7abf14c8 At 23:23 on 5 April, a 23-year-old university student in Taichung transmitted a falsified General Alarm signal into the Taiwan High Speed Rail Corporation’s internal radio system. Four trains travelling at up to 300 km/h received the highest-priority emergency alert and switched to manual braking. The entire high-speed rail network was disrupted for 48 minutes.
